---
name: Submit your game
about: Submit your game for PS3 systems
title: "[GAME_REQUEST] TITLE_ID, GAME_NAME"
labels: game-request
assignees: AcidGunner

---

There you can submit your game. Here is how:
1. Send us your PS3 game package (.pkg)
2. Label it as either CFW or HEN compatible. We need to know it's working.
3. Send us the screenshots of your game.
4. Last, but not least, type your game's TITLE_ID and what's made with. We would love to know :)
